title: Flavoured
description: New meat variations depending on where its cooked.
body:
Basically, this mod adds functionality to the smoker by adding new meat variations that give off more saturation, but they take longer to eat and replentish the food bar a little it less.
(Playing with appleskin is recommended)

Adds:
- Smoked steak,
- Smoked mutton,
- Smoked Porkchop,
- Chevon (goat meat),
- Cooked Chevon,
- Smoked Chevon,
- Hogchop (hoglin meat),
- Cooked Hogchop,
- Smoked Hogchop,

(Roasted variants for campfires are also coming) :)
